Sample	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-percent_duplicates	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-percent_gc	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-avg_sequence_length	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-median_sequence_length	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-percent_fails	FastQC (raw)_mqc-generalstats-fastqc_raw-total_sequences	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-pct_duplication	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-after_filtering_q30_rate	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-after_filtering_q30_bases	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-filtering_result_passed_filter_reads	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-after_filtering_gc_content	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-pct_surviving	FastP (Read preprocessing)_mqc-generalstats-fastp_read_preprocessing-pct_adapter	GATK4 MarkDuplicates: Mark Duplicates_mqc-generalstats-gatk4_markduplicates_mark_duplicates-PERCENT_DUPLICATION	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-error_rate	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-non_primary_alignments	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-reads_mapped	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-reads_mapped_percent	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-reads_properly_paired_percent	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-reads_MQ0_percent	Samtools Flagstat: stats_mqc-generalstats-samtools_flagstat_stats-raw_total_sequences	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-1_x_pc	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-5_x_pc	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-10_x_pc	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-30_x_pc	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-50_x_pc	Mosdepth_mqc-generalstats-mosdepth-median_coverage
